Board & Committees

Our Homeowners Association is entirely volunteer-run. The Board of Directors and various committees work diligently to maintain the quality of life in our community.

Board of Directors

Jane Doe - President

Jane has lived in the neighborhood since 2015 and brings over 10 years of property management experience to the board.

John Smith - Vice President

John moved to Wright Farm in 2018. He is passionate about preserving the community’s green spaces and historic charm.

Architectural Review Committee

  • Alice Jones, Chair

Social Committee

  • Bob Brown, Chair

Meadows of Wright Farm HOA

Springfield Township, OH 45231
